title: International 30 theater release images
wikitext:
[]: International 3.0 theater release images             Quote Post by Xiel » Mon May 13, 2013 9:03 am These are promo in theaters or tickets I could find. If you have more to add, please post them! South Korea tickets: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: International 3.0 theater release images             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon May 13, 2013 9:10 am Xiel wrote: Hong Kong theater: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: International 3.0 theater release images             Quote Post by Xiel » Mon May 13, 2013 9:13 am Monk Ed wrote: You'd think it was fan art, but no! Oh man, this is awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Mon May 13, 2013 9:13 am O_________O Shinji blushing and Kaworu holding his hand...... THIS is PERFECT art.

[]:             Quote Post by Xiel » Mon May 13, 2013 9:16 am I'm sure there was a standing individual figure of Tentative Name Ayanami too but I can't find where I saved it.

[]: Re: International 3.0 theater release images             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon May 13, 2013 9:28 am Xiel wrote: You may want to save the Shinji and Kaworu official banner of haruyama clothing brand and notice how it's named.

[]:             Quote Post by Xiel » Mon May 13, 2013 9:42 am This is tame . Masayuki and Tsurumaki have done more risque KaworuxShinji art in the past. Plus during the 90s, you had those official manga anthologies published with Kaworu and Shinji having sex on page (very creative use of panels to avoid showing penetration). 90s art was painful eye bleeding bad .
